common.title: Title

auth.linkProblem: That sign-in link didn't work — it may have expired or already been used. Enter your email below for a fresh one.
auth.signInProblem: We couldn't sign you in. Please try again.
auth.accountDeleted: Your account and all your data have been permanently deleted. Thank you for growing with us. 🌱

login.sentBody: We sent a sign-in link to {email}. Open it on this device to continue.
login.subtitle: Sign in with your email — no password needed.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.intro: Bonsai Companion is a personal project shared with a few friends. Here's exactly what it keeps and your rights over it, in plain language.
privacy.storeBody: Your email address (to sign you in), and the trees, care history, tasks, and photos you add — nothing else. No tracking, no analytics, no advertising.
privacy.whereBody: In a Supabase database hosted in the EU. Photos sit in a private bucket (location data is stripped from each image) and are served through short-lived signed links. An encrypted off-site backup is kept for recovery.
privacy.rightsBody: Export everything at any time — JSON, CSV, and your photos — from Settings, and permanently delete your account and all its data from Settings.
privacy.retentionBody: Your account and data are removed from the app and active storage immediately. Copies in the encrypted off-site backup are purged on request — just ask.
privacy.contactBody: Reach the owner directly at the address you were invited from.

today.title: Today
today.empty: Nothing needs attention right now. Enjoy your trees. 🌱
today.summaryDueToday: {count, plural, one {# due today} other {# due today}}
today.firstRunTitle: Add your first tree to start tracking its care.

collection.archivedLoadError: We couldn't load your archived trees right now. Please refresh to try again.
collection.archivedEmpty: No archived trees. Archiving a tree hides it from your collection without losing its history.

collection.filtersActiveAria: {count, plural, one {# active filter} other {# active filters}}

settings.title: Settings
settings.loadError: We could not load your settings right now. Please refresh the page to try again.
settings.appearanceDescription: Choose a light or dark theme, or follow your device.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the language for the app.
settings.yourDataDescription: Export a complete, portable copy of your collection — trees, care history, tasks, and photo details. Your record is always yours to keep. JSON is the lossless format for backup; CSV opens in any spreadsheet.
settings.hemisphereHint: Drives seasonal care timing, so getting this right matters.
settings.deleteWarning: This permanently deletes your account and all your data — every tree, photo, care log, and task. It cannot be undone. Consider exporting your data first.
settings.errBadUnits: Please choose a valid unit system.
settings.errDeleteFailed: We could not delete your account.

quickAdd.loadError: We couldn't load your trees. Close this and try again.

quickAdd.photoNote: The photo is added to this tree's timeline.

plan.scheduleIntro: Set up the same task — watering, feeding, an inspection, anything — on several trees at once. Make it recurring or a one-off; you can edit any of it per tree later.
plan.scheduleNoTrees: Add a tree first, then come back to plan its care.
plan.fertilizeIntro: The classic bonsai plan — every 14 days through the growing season — set up across as many trees as you like. It skips winter automatically, and you can edit any of it later per tree.
plan.fertilizeNoTrees: Add a tree first, then come back to plan its feeding.
plan.scheduleButton: {count, plural, one {Schedule on # tree} other {Schedule on # trees}}
plan.scheduleSuccess: {count, plural, one {Scheduled {label} on # tree} other {Scheduled {label} on # trees}}. 🌿
plan.fertilizeSuccess: {count, plural, one {Created # fertilizing schedule} other {Created # fertilizing schedules}}. 🌿
plan.fertilizeHint: Feeding your trees? The <link>fertilizing preset</link> pre-fills the classic every-14-days, growing-season schedule.
plan.errBadType: Choose a valid type of care.
plan.errCreateFailed: We couldn't create that plan. Please try again.
